description: Outlaw motorcycle club based in Germany, founded in 1984 from the merger of several MCs. It has 39 German chapters and additional chapters in Romania, Belgium, Thailand, and Poland. The club is considered police-relevant by Bavarian authorities, a designation it denies.

country_links.context: The Trust Motorcycle Club has one chapter in Belgium.
The Trust Motorcycle Club has a presence in Poland.
The Trust Motorcycle Club has seven chapters in Romania.
The Trust Motorcycle Club has one chapter in Thailand.
